variants.label: KR ETF Core Satellite 50/40/10
variants.description: Monthly 50% US core, 40% strongest satellite ETF, 10% defensive ETF.

variants.label: KR ETF Score Top3 Equal
variants.description: Monthly rebalance 100% of the account into the top 3 individual ETF scores, ignoring group buckets.

variants.label: KR ETF Score C Core Satellite 50/40/10
variants.description: Monthly 50/40/10 ETF account with 90% individual score + 10% group leadership for ETF selection.

variants.label: KR ETF Score Top2 Equal
variants.description: Monthly rebalance 100% of the account into the top 2 individual ETF scores, ignoring group buckets.

variants.label: KR ETF Score Top1
variants.description: Monthly rebalance 100% of the account into the single highest individual ETF score.

variants.label: KR ETF Benchmark Plus Satellite
variants.description: Monthly 50% KODEX 200 and 50% strongest non-benchmark ETF satellite.

variants.label: KR ETF KOSPI Alpha Top2
variants.description: When KODEX 200 trend is strong, rotate into the strongest two KOSPI alpha ETFs. In weak regimes, move to defensive ETFs.

variants.label: KR ETF Benchmark Or Alpha
variants.description: When KODEX 200 trend is strong, hold the strongest KOSPI alpha ETF. Otherwise hold KODEX 200.
